Alert Name: VCDA Failed to connect to Cloud Director

Alert Subtype: Availability

Alert Type: Application

Cancel Date: Unavailable

Control State: Open

Criticality: immediate

Host Name: vrops-ui.dalpr.dir

Alert Link: https://vrops-ui.dalpr.dir/vcf-operations/ui/inventory;mode=hierarchy;resourceId=2f1af7a5-da57-4265-8c94-9b1f19a62bda;tab=alerts-and-symptoms;subTab=alerts;entityId=eabbd0d3-07e1-49f2-9cce-f780b066186c

Notification Rule Description: 

Notification Rule Name: PD: VCDA Failed to connect to Cloud Director

Object Efficiency State: 1.0

Object Health State: 3.0

Object Risk State: 2.0

Product: ['N/A', 'N/A', 'N/A']

Recommendations: Ensure that the associated Cloud Director instance is healthy and is accessible from Cloud Director Availability. |
 Ensure that the Cloud Director cluster, the individual cells, and the load balancer are healthy. |
 Ensure that the Cloud Director URL used in Cloud Director Availability is reachable from the Cloud Director Replication Management Appliance over TCP port 443. |
 Re-register Cloud Director in the Cloud Director Availability Provider Portal.

Runbook URL: Runbook: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/vrops_sev2_alerts.html

Recommendations: Ensure that the associated Cloud Director instance is healthy and is accessible from Cloud Director Availability. |
 Ensure that the Cloud Director cluster, the individual cells, and the load balancer are healthy. |
 Ensure that the Cloud Director URL used in Cloud Director Availability is reachable from the Cloud Director Replication Management Appliance over TCP port 443. |
